html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Gold Flooring is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover. Its rare Blueprint is obtained by feeding the Red Crown to the Antlion.

TurfsCraftable Items

plainText:
Gold Flooring
"Set the groundwork for a new golden age."
Object Info
7.5 sec.
Can be Burned
20
Crafting
×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
()
Miscellaneous
"turf_cotl_gold"
Gold Flooring
Can be Dug
Exclusive to:
“Don't walk on that, it was expensive!”
–Wilson
“It reflects the firelight nicely.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang has never seen floor so fancy.”
–Wolfgang
“If I follow the yellow bricks, will they take me home?”
–Wendy
“COVER THE EARTH IN METAL”
–WX-78
“Children, wipe your feet before you even think about walking on that floor!”
–Wickerbottom
“That's one fancy floor, eh?”
–Woodie
“A bit gaudy, but it certainly makes an impression.”
–Maxwell
“The land is cövered in riches!”
–Wigfrid
“We can make the ground shiny!”
–Webber
“This seems a bit much...”
–Warly
“Pretty floor”
–Wormwood
“Couldn't that gold have been used for somethin' more practical?”
–Winona
“All that gold, and this is what we have to show floor it.”
–Wortox
“Fancy ground.”
–Wurt
“That's a pretty fancy floor!”
–Walter
“Surely there's a better use for all that gold?!”
–Wanda
“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”
-
Gold Flooring is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover. Its rare Blueprint is obtained by feeding the Red Crown to the Antlion.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sàn Vàng là một Vật phẩm Đất có thể chế tạo được dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu như một phần của Giáo phái Lamb Crossover. Bản thiết kế quý hiếm của nó có được bằng cách cho Kiến Sư tử ăn Vương miện đỏ.
title: Gold Flooring
